nasb.text: I will lay waste the mountains and hills And wither all their vegetation; I will make the rivers into coastlands And dry up the ponds.

esv.text: I will lay waste mountains and hills, and dry up all their vegetation; I will turn the rivers into islands, and dry up the pools.

cnv.text: 我必使大山小山都變為荒場， 使一切草木都枯乾； 我要使江河變為乾地， 使水池乾涸。

ccb.text: 我要使大山小丘一片荒凉， 上面的草木都枯萎。 我要使河川变成岛屿， 池塘干涸。

csbs.text: 我要使群山、冈陵荒废， 使其上的一切草木枯干； 我要使河流变为洲岛， 使池塘都枯干。
